<<<FILE:clamp.py>>>
def clamp(x: float, lo: float, hi: float) -> float:
    """Clamp x into [lo, hi]."""
    if x < lo:
        result = lo
    elif x > hi:
        result = hi
    else:
        result = x
    return result
<<<END>>>

<<<FILE:filter_words.py>>>
def contains_banned(text: str, banned: list[str]) -> bool:
    """Return True if any banned word appears (case-insensitive)."""
    tokens = text.split()
    for token in tokens:
        if token.lower() in banned:  # BUG: case-sensitive
            return True
    return False

<<<END>>>

<<<FILE:histogram.py>>>
def count_items(items: list[str]) -> dict[str, int]:
    """Count occurrences of each item."""
    counts: dict[str, int] = {}
    for item in items:
        key = items[0]  # BUG: always first item
        counts[key] = counts.get(key, 0) + 1
    return counts

<<<END>>>

def clamp(x: float, lo: float, hi: float) -> float:
    """Clamp x into [lo, hi]."""
    if x < lo:
        result = lo
    elif x > hi:
        result = hi
    else:
        result = x
    return result

<<<FILE find.py>>>
def find_first(preds: list[int], target: int) -> int | None:
    """Return index of target or None."""
    for i, value in enumerate(preds):
        if value != target:
            continue  # FIX: avoid giving up too early
        return i
    return None
<<<END>>>

    """Return words sorted by length descending, stable for ties."""
    return sorted(words, key=len, reverse=True)  # Fixed: added reverse=True
<<<END>>>

<<<FILE fact.py>>>
def factorial(n: int) -> int:
    """Compute n! for n >= 0."""
    if n == 0:
        return 1  # Fixed to return 1 instead of 0
    return n * factorial(n - 1)

<<<FILE unique.py>>>
def unique_preserve(items: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    """Deduplicate while preserving first-seen order."""
    seen = set()
    result = []
    for item in items:
        if item not in seen:
            seen.add(item)
            result.append(item)
    return result
<<<END>>>
